content.text:
Based on your query for dermaplaning facials in Katy, TX, I'll provide a quick overview and some local options. Dermaplaning is a non-invasive exfoliation treatment that uses a surgical scalpel to gently remove dead skin cells and fine facial hair (peach fuzz), leaving your skin smoother and more radiant[[1]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/dermaplaning). It's often combined with facials for better product absorption. Prices typically range from $50–$150 per session, depending on the provider and add-ons, but I recommend contacting them directly for current rates and availability (as of April 2026).

Here are some highly rated spots in Katy offering dermaplaning services, based on recent web searches:

- **Clear Dermatology**: They specialize in dermaplaning to exfoliate dead skin and remove peach fuzz. Located in Katy, they offer it as part of their skincare treatments[[1]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/dermaplaning). Website: cleardermatology.com.

- **MedSpa At Villagio**: This med spa provides dermaplaning using a sterile scalpel for skin resurfacing. It's a popular choice for facials in the area[[2]](https://medspaatvillagio.com/dermaplaning). Website: medspaatvillagio.com.

- **Le Chloé Med Spa**: They offer dermaplaning as a complement to their custom facials, focusing on deep exfoliation and hair removal[[3]](https://lechloemedspa.com/facials/dermaplaning-katy-tx). Website: lechloemedspa.com.

- **Anitas Skincare Clinic**: Expert in dermaplaning for all ages, aiming for healthy, glowing skin. They have years of experience in Katy[[4]](https://anitasskincareclinickaty.com/dermaplaning). Website: anitasskincareclinickaty.com.

- **Allay Med Spa**: Provides dermaplaning for issues like acne scars, dry skin, and sun damage. Multiple locations including Katy[[5]](https://www.allaymedspa.com/dermaplaning-skin-care-katy-tx). Website: allaymedspa.com.

For more options, check Yelp reviews, where places like SkinSpirit in Katy get high marks for dermaplaning and related facials[[6]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Dermaplaning&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)[[7]](https://www.skinspirit.com/menu-of-services/facials-in-katy-tx). If you're looking for something specific (e.g., pricing, reviews, or booking), let me know for a deeper search!
